questions.question: Construct a PDA to recognize the language {0^n1^n | n ≥ 0}.
expectedPoints: define the states and the stack alphabet

questions.question: Explain the difference between a PDA and a DPDA, and provide an example of a language that can be recognized by a PDA but not by a DPDA.
expectedPoints: explain the difference between the two
provide an example of a language that can be recognized by a PDA but not by a DPDA
